case_title: ZARKO COSOVIC VS. AMERICAN SCOOTER & CYCLE RENTAL INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,041.12 FILED BY COSOVIC, ZARKO AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SCOOTER & CYCLE RENTAL INC. BLAZING SADDLES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSOVIC, ZARKO AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SCOOTER & CYCLE RENTAL INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLAZING SADDLES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSOVIC, ZARKO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN SCOOTER & CYCLE RENTAL INC. BLAZING SADDLES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ZARKO COSOVIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN SCOOTER & CYCLE RENTAL INC DBA BLAZING SADDLES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANNELAINE CLAUSS VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A.
